items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 I really love this game! The stories are
items.summary: I really love this game! The stories are interesting and the gameplay is challenging, but most of all, the game is really generous with pulls as a gacha game!
items.author: Amaryllis Anemone

items.title: [Google Play 中评] ★3 The game is very fun, the character is g
items.summary: The game is very fun, the character is great. Many things are awesome. But the biggest problem is once you clear the story mode, the content left for you to play with is pitiful. I wish to see more content than this. Its been a good 2.5 years journey but I might have to quit cuz nothing left to do. I dont even have a reason to spend and pull more stuff cuz I have nowhere to use them.
items.author: Thirat Kuakulkitjaroen

items.author: Baramee Kuanoon

items.title: [Google Play 差评] ★1 Uses AI images without disclosure. ex. N
items.summary: Uses AI images without disclosure. ex. Nautilia is very clearly AI despite looking somewhat legit at first glance. Personally won't spend money on a character pull with AI character images but they could at least be transparent with players(100% there is AI use in this game. I ignored all mild flags until ridiculously obvious AI generated images was displayed and there was no chance it was stylistic choices or human error before I felt comfortable making this statement). The story is good
items.author: Viomomo
